title: Verify Analytics: Event tracking for widget interaction and viewing
description: Tests that viewing and clicking the homepage widget/pill triggers the correct analytics events with the right attributes.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.

steps.description: 1. Log in and load the Homepage.
2. Verify the 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' event is triggered with 'home-trial-active' as the variant.
4. Verify the 'trial-corner-widget-clicked' event is triggered with 'home-trial-active' as the variant.
5. Verify the 'trial-corner-viewed' event is triggered upon landing on the hub page.

expected_result: All three specified events ('trial-corner-widget-viewed', 'trial-corner-widget-clicked', 'trial-corner-viewed') are triggered in sequence with the correct attributes.
